strategy: He is only 4500 health with a flat 20% resist. Set up and burst before the Drakes ramp.
While Malistaire and Sylvia are together they Virulent Plague the team every round, cutting your healing. Cleanse or just outpace it.
Sylvia eventually Dark Pacts herself to death to give Malistaire a +100% Balanceblade. Kill Malistaire before that lands, or remove the blade and then hit.
Turn order randomly switches, so do not count on always hitting last.
Blade, Feint, and drop him quickly rather than dragging the fight into their combo turns.
cheatNotes: Turn order randomly switches, so you cannot always count on hitting last.
Joining late brings an interrupt Fire Dragon. Arrive on time.
While Sylvia is alive alongside him, the team gets Virulent Plague every round (heal debuff). Cleanse or burst fast.
When Malistaire is alone, he strips 25% of his own health and AoE Mana Burns the team, draining your pips but making him easier to finish.
He resummons Sylvia (Tier 3) and Chokes the team.
Sylvia Dark Pacts, killing herself to hand Malistaire a +100% Balanceblade. Remove the blade or kill him before he swings.
